results.title: Germany rail network comes to complete halt nationwide due to IT malfunction

results.title: Governor signs ‘comma bill’ and fixes typo in law to cover firefighter cancer claims
results.description: Arizona firefighters will no longer have to fight insurance companies over a typo in state law. Arizona Gov. Katie Hobbs signed into law Monday what’s known as the “comma bill.”

results.title: Johnny Olszewski seeks reelection in Maryland's 2nd Congressional District
results.description: Johnny Olszewski is running for reelection in Maryland's second congressional district. It includes Baltimore County and parts of Carroll County and Baltimore City.
